productName: SF TWI FY - 2.5G - Baja Blazed - Key Lime - HYB - CR
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of Baja Blazed, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a tart, crisp lime flavor, delivering a versatile, anytime balance. Pace yourself.
